text: Batteries fitted in an EPIRB, SART, etc., are to be changed when:

options.text: Battery to be changed as per the expiry date mentioned by the maker
Only after they drain out completely during an emergency

explanation: Batteries for safety equipment like SARTs and EPIRBs have a limited service life due to chemical degradation. They must be replaced by the manufacturer's specified expiry date to ensure reliability.
